title: Top BA LLB Colleges in Noida, Delhi NCR | Galgotias University
content: The Three year LL.B. (H) programme is designed with an objective of providing intensive training to the students in practising law and imparts knowledge and skills required to meet the challenges facing the daily legal practice. The Programme is also intended to sharpen their research acumen and encourage interdisciplinary study of law and other sciences. Graduation with minimum 50% in aggregate OR Graduation with minimum 45% aggregate from a recognized university with valid CUET/CLAT /AILET Score 01 Utilize comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge to meet the contemporary challenges. 02 Serve the society through their professional skills in advocacy, judicial and other legal services. 03 Handle legal issues cutting across boundaries covering substantive and procedural laws. 04 Exhibit legal excellence at international and domestic fora. 01 Possess the understanding and application of legal theories, Substantive and Procedural laws. 02 Demonstrate proficiency in legal research, reasoning and analysis. 03 Demonstrate proficiency in written and oral communication. 04 Gain knowledge of law in its historical and sociological perspective and apply the same in their profession. 05 Develop mooting, counselling and negotiation skills. 06 Imbibe ethics to be demonstrated in professional setup. 07 Students shall serve the society through legal aid and legal awareness. 01 Utilize comprehensive theoretical and practical knowledge in indigenous as well as foreign legal traditions, lawyering skills and research to meet the contemporary challenges. 02 Serve the society through their professional skills in advocacy, judicial and other legal services. 03 Handle legal issues cutting across boundaries covering domains such as Constitutional Laws, Criminal Laws, Corporate Laws and IPR Laws. 04 Exhibit legal excellence at international and domestic fora. 01 Prepared to contribute effectively in the fields of constitutional law, civil law, criminal law, labour law, environmental law and cyber law. 02 Able to critically analyse all the existing laws and apply the legal and advocacy skills to excel in their respective professions.
